str: This parameter expects string as a value. Please apply anything You want, but remember that the Parameter has to be coherent with logic of the program.
int: This parameter expects int as a value. Please put the integer here, if the variable is related to time please apply int inthe following format: YYYYMMDD.
float: This parameter expects float as a value. Plese apply float
list: This parameter expects list as a value. Please apply your parameter with presented format: ['str0', 'str1', 'str2']
bool: This parameter expects bool as a value. Please press enter if You want this value to be False. If you apply anything else the value will be set to True.
dict: dicts are no allowed right now.
